description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The front facade features large rectangular windows and a central arched doorway with a welcome mat, while the rear opens onto a spacious fenced patio with outdoor furniture, a grill, and a doghouse. The house includes multiple rooms visible from above, with minimalistic interior partitions and a rooftop HVAC unit. The exterior is primarily finished in white and gray, with wooden fencing enclosing the patio area. The ground level at the back includes a garage or covered parking area, partially visible beneath the patio. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with an emphasis on open outdoor living and large window surfaces.
description: A modern, two-story house with large windows, a flat roof, and a fenced patio featuring outdoor amenities. The design is clean and geometric, with a mix of white, gray, and wood finishes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with an arched door, large rectangular windows, and the fenced patio to the right.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the fenced patio with outdoor furniture, grill, doghouse, and the garage or covered parking area below.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the patio, kitchen cabinetry, and the open layout of the upper floor rooms.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the flat roof, window arrangement, and minimalistic rear facade.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central arched doorway with a welcome mat, flanked by large windows, no porch or overhang
